cocktails.name: Classic Margarita
cocktails.instructions: Rub the rim of the glass with the lime slice to make the salt stick to it. Shake the other ingredients with ice, then carefully pour into the glass.

cocktails.name: Mojito
cocktails.instructions: Muddle mint leaves with sugar and lime juice. Add rum and top with soda water. Garnish with mint sprig.

cocktails.name: Espresso Martini
cocktails.instructions: Add vodka, coffee liqueur, and espresso into a shaker filled with ice. Shake well and strain into a chilled glass.

notes.text: Try using fresh lime juice for the best flavor.
Lightly crush the mint to release the aroma without making it bitter.
